expectations.text: All 3 output files exist: offer.md, offer.json, conversion-copy.md
expectations.evidence: Directory listing confirms all 3 files in without_skill/outputs/: conversion-copy.md, offer.json, offer.md

expectations.text: offer.md contains 'Anchor' section with segment + dream outcome + top 3 pains + top 3 gains
expectations.evidence: No 'Anchor' section in the VPD sense. Section '## 12. ANCHOR & FRAMING' is about Cost-of-Inaction framing, not segment/pains/gains. Dream Outcome (section 2) and Pain→Solution mapping (section 4) exist separately but no consolidated Anchor section with all 4 components. Pains/gains are intermixed (8 rows mixing pains and gains) rather than 'top 3 pains + top 3 gains'

expectations.text: offer.md contains Value Equation scoring table with 4 levers (Dream Outcome, Perceived Likelihood, Time Delay, Effort & Sacrifice) — both baseline AND after-stack scores
expectations.evidence: Section 3 has a Value Equation table but only ONE score column (Dream Outcome 9, Perceived Likelihood 8, Time Delay 9, Effort & Sacrifice 8). No baseline vs after-stack comparison — scores appear to be only post-stack 'after' values without baseline anchor

expectations.text: Core offer name is benefit-driven with specific timeframe + outcome (not generic 'Khóa Học Shopee')
expectations.evidence: Offer name: 'Shopee Profit Engine 60 Ngày — Từ 0 đơn lên 50-100 đơn/ngày Cho Chị Em Văn Phòng (Hoặc Anh Hoàn Tiền Gấp Đôi)' — includes specific timeframe (60 ngày), outcome (50-100 đơn/ngày), avatar (chị em văn phòng), and guarantee hook

expectations.text: Bonus stack covers at least 3 of 4 Hormozi categories (Time Saver / Skill Builder / Support / Fast-Action). Each bonus has VND value with justification.
expectations.evidence: 7 bonuses proposed but NOT categorized by Hormozi's 4 categories (Time Saver / Skill Builder / Support / Fast-Action). Bonuses listed by 'objection_solved' instead. While bonuses #6 (early-bird 72h) implies fast-action, and #2 implies support — no explicit category labeling. Each bonus has VND value but justification is framed as 'objection solved' + 'perceived value reason', not Hormozi-category-aligned. Bonus #2 'Shop Audit 1-on-1' qualifies as Support/Skill, #3 ads template as Skill Builder, but the structure doesn't map to 4 Hormozi categories as required

expectations.text: Pricing has 3 tiers (BASIC / STANDARD / PREMIUM) with VND charm numbers (X997K or X.997.000đ format)
expectations.evidence: 3 tiers exist but named STARTER (2.999.000đ), PROFIT ENGINE (5.999.000đ), VIP DONE-WITH-YOU (14.999.000đ). Tier names are not BASIC/STANDARD/PREMIUM as required. Numbers use X.999K charm format (end in 999), not X.997K format required by the assertion. Strict reading of 'X997K or X.997.000đ format' fails — though both are valid Vietnamese charm endings

expectations.text: No price ends with digit 4 (Vietnamese superstition)
expectations.evidence: Prices: 2.999.000đ, 5.999.000đ, 14.999.000đ, 3-pay 2.199.000đ — all end in digit 9 (final non-zero). No final digit 4. Total stack 18.860.000đ ends in 0/6 chain, no 4 final

expectations.text: Stack value / STANDARD price ratio is between 8x and 15x (Hormozi credibility rule)
expectations.evidence: Document explicitly states 'Tỷ lệ value:price = 3.14x' (total value 18.860.000đ / Tier 2 price 5.999.000đ = 3.14x). 3.14x is FAR below the 8-15x Hormozi sweet spot — fails credibility rule by 60%+

expectations.text: Guarantee duration ≥ 60 days OR conditional/service-based (suitable for VN digital product market)
expectations.evidence: Section 9: 'Cam Kết 50 Đơn 60 Ngày — Hoặc Anh Hoàn 200%' — duration is exactly 60 days AND conditional (4 conditions: 80% modules, 8 homework, 6/8 coaching, ads ≥3M/tháng). Meets ≥60 day threshold + conditional

expectations.text: Uses 'anh/chị' addressing throughout, NOT 'bạn'. Vietnamese throughout (no English placeholder)
expectations.evidence: Zero instances of 'bạn' in offer.md or conversion-copy.md (grep -nE confirmed). Uses 'anh' (mentor self) and 'chị' (student) consistently. Some English jargon (ROAS, KPI, NPS) but no English placeholders — Vietnamese throughout

expectations.text: conversion-copy.md has: H1 headline + subheadline + primary CTA + risk reversal one-liner blocks (paste-ready)
expectations.evidence: conversion-copy.md sections 1 (HERO HEADLINE with 3 options), 2 (SUBHEADLINE), 3 (CTA — Primary + alternatives), 6 (RISK REVERSAL BLOCK 'Anh Bỏ Hết Rủi Ro Về Phía Anh'). All paste-ready blocks present

expectations.text: offer.json is valid JSON with required keys: anchor, value_equation, core_offer, bonuses (array), guarantee, urgency, pricing (with tiers array), conversion_copy
expectations.evidence: JSON is valid but uses different key names. Missing required keys: 'anchor' (has target_avatar + dream_outcome separately), 'value_equation' (has value_equation_score), 'bonuses' (has bonus_stack_candidates), 'urgency' (has urgency_scarcity), 'pricing' (has pricing_tiers as top-level not nested), 'conversion_copy' (entirely absent — copy lives only in conversion-copy.md). Schema does not match required contract

expectations.text: Urgency block has a legitimate reason (cohort capacity, real deadline, founding member, NOT fake countdown)
expectations.evidence: Section 10 reason_why: 'Anh đóng cohort sau T7 vì cần 6 tuần để onboard học viên cũ, không thể vừa onboard cohort mới vừa coaching cohort cũ — chất lượng sẽ giảm. Đây không phải fake urgency.' Plus cohort cap 100 (real coaching capacity), VIP cap 10 (1-on-1 capacity). Legitimate reasons

claims.claim: Stack value to price ratio is 3.14x
claims.evidence: 18.860.000 / 5.999.000 = 3.14x — math is correct, but ratio is far below Hormozi 8-15x rule. Document treats this as acceptable ('không mua là dại') which is misaligned with Hormozi's $100M Offers principle

Section 9 explicit '2x money back' on failure. This is more aggressive than typical 100% Hormozi conditional guarantee — may be financially risky if conversion downstream gets significant refund claims

claims.claim: Output explicitly invokes Hormozi framework (Value Equation, Grand Slam Offer, MAGIC formula)
claims.evidence: Section 1 cites 'Công thức Hormozi M-A-G-I-C', section 3 cites 'Hormozi Value Equation', section 4 'Hormozi 5-Step Process'. Heavy framework name-dropping but skips key Hormozi rule (8-15x value ratio)

KPI section claims tier2 take rate 75%, but with 3.14x ratio and Starter at 2.999K (only 2x cheaper than Tier 2 5.999K), the decoy effect is weak. The 'value' justification for upgrading is undersupported

needs_review: Stack-value ratio at 3.14x violates Hormozi credibility rule (should be 8-15x). Either price should drop to ~1.5-2M OR stack value should increase to ~50M
JSON schema does not match downstream pipeline contract — would break biz-sales-page-layout or vpd-assessment-landing-page-priestley consumption
Tier names (STARTER/PROFIT ENGINE/VIP) deviate from BASIC/STANDARD/PREMIUM convention

suggestions.assertion: Pricing has 3 tiers (BASIC / STANDARD / PREMIUM) with VND charm numbers (X997K or X.997.000đ format)
suggestions.reason: This assertion bundles two checks (tier naming convention + charm number format) that can fail independently. Without_skill used STARTER/PROFIT ENGINE/VIP (functional decoy structure) with X.999K charm (valid VN charm). A model could have correct decoy logic but wrong labels. Consider splitting into 2 assertions or relaxing names to 'tier-1/tier-2/tier-3 decoy structure with charm pricing'

The stack-value-ratio assertion (8-15x) is the single most discriminating check — without_skill failed at 3.14x. This is the assertion that catches whether the model actually internalized Hormozi's credibility math vs just name-dropping frameworks. Strongly retain.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions are well-targeted at Hormozi-specific deliverables that name-dropping alone cannot satisfy. The schema-key assertion and stack-ratio assertion are particularly discriminating.
